testcase.name: Flow row utilities > camelizes rows and clamps pagination inputs
Flow row utilities > accepts object bodies and rejects null, arrays, and primitives
FlowAdapterRegistry > returns safe defaults when optional adapters or capabilities are absent
FlowAdapterRegistry > delegates adapter operations and wraps adapter failures
FlowAnalyticsService > assembles open task filters and maps snake_case rows
FlowAnalyticsService > omits runs summary WHERE when no filters and defaults total to zero
FlowAnalyticsService > uses open task default query values when no query is supplied
FlowAnalyticsService > adds runs summary filters only for non-empty string values
FlowPolicyService > delegates policy set and rule CRUD to the design service
FlowPolicyService > defaults allow when no active policy set resolves
FlowPolicyService > returns the first matching rule using empty, jsonpath, and object conditions
Flow controllers > delegates design controller methods to FlowDesignService
Flow controllers > delegates form and fill controller methods to FlowFormsService
Flow controllers > delegates runtime, analytics, policy, signal, and effect methods
FlowDesignService — scopes > listScopes returns camelized rows
FlowDesignService — scopes > getScope returns one or throws NotFound
FlowDesignService — scopes > createScope INSERTs and returns the new row
FlowDesignService — scopes > updateScope rejects empty patch (no defined entries + no audit columns on scope)
FlowDesignService — scopes > updateScope returns NotFound when row absent
FlowDesignService — scopes > updateScope returns the camelized row
FlowDesignService — scopes > deleteScope asserts existence then softDeletes
FlowDesignService — scopes > deleteScope throws NotFound when row absent
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > listGraphs filters by scope_id when provided
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > listGraphs without scopeId omits WHERE
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > getGraph, updateGraph, and deleteGraph route through shared CRUD helpers
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > createGraph INSERTs into flow.graphs
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > listGraphNodes filters by graph_id
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > createGraphNode attaches graphId to the input
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > createGraphNode rejects non-object input
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > getNode returns one or throws NotFound
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > updateNode requires at least one defined field
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > updateNode returns NotFound when row absent
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > deleteNode asserts existence then softDeletes
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > listGraphEdges filters by graph_id and orders by sort_order/action
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > createGraphEdge attaches graphId
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > updateEdge returns the camelized row
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > getEdge throws NotFound when missing
FlowDesignService — graphs / nodes / edges > deleteEdge softDeletes after assertion
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > createNodeAgentRule attaches nodeId
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > updateAgentRule + getAgentRule + deleteAgentRule round-trip
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > createGraphTransitionEffect attaches graphId
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > createNodeFormRule normalizes score_threshold → threshold gating mode
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > lists node-scoped rules and normalizes any_answered node-form rules
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > transition effect read, list, update, and delete routes are covered
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > updateNodeFormRule passes through partial updates
FlowDesignService — agentRules / transitionEffects / nodeFormRules > getNodeFormRule + deleteNodeFormRule round-trip
FlowDesignService — policySets / policyRules > listPolicySets filters by scope_id when provided
FlowDesignService — policySets / policyRules > createPolicySet INSERTs
FlowDesignService — policySets / policyRules > updatePolicySet, getPolicySet, and deletePolicySet route through shared helpers
FlowDesignService — policySets / policyRules > listPolicyRules filters by policy_set_id
FlowDesignService — policySets / policyRules > createPolicyRule attaches policySetId
FlowDesignService — policySets / policyRules > updatePolicyRule / getPolicyRule / deletePolicyRule work
FlowDesignService.importGraph > rejects when no start node is present
FlowDesignService.importGraph > rejects duplicate node codes
FlowDesignService.importGraph > rejects edges referencing missing node codes
FlowDesignService.importGraph > rejects duplicate edge keys
FlowDesignService.importGraph > inserts graph + nodes + edges and returns an export document
FlowDesignService.importGraph > imports optional transition effects, agent rules, and node form rules
FlowDesignService.importGraph > throws when an insert returns no row
FlowDesignService.importGraph > throws when import graph insertion returns a non-string graph id
FlowDesignService.exportGraph > queries graph + nodes + edges + transitionEffects + agentRules + nodeFormRules + policySets
FlowDesignService.exportGraph > skips the policyRules query when no policySets matched
FlowDesignService — tenant + input validation > requireTenantId throws when no tenant in context
FlowDesignService — tenant + input validation > objectInput rejects arrays + null via createNodeAgentRule
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > listForms scopes by scope_id when provided
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > listForms without scopeId omits WHERE
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > getForm returns row by id
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > getForm throws NotFoundException when missing
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > createForm INSERTs and returns the new row
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > updateRow throws BadRequest when no updatable column fields are present (waiver delete)
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > updateForm throws NotFoundException when no row returned
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > updateForm returns the camelized updated row
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > deleteForm asserts existence then calls trx.softDelete
FlowFormsService > forms CRUD > deleteForm throws NotFoundException when row does not exist
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > listQuestions filters by form_id
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > createQuestion attaches formId to the input
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > createQuestion rejects non-object input
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > question get, update, and delete methods route through shared helpers
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > putQuestionScore upserts and returns the camelized row
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > putQuestionScore propagates NotFound from assertExists
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > getQuestionScore returns one row or throws NotFound
FlowFormsService > questions / scores > deleteQuestionScore looks up then softDeletes the score row
FlowFormsService > fills > listFills filters by all known query keys (string values only)
FlowFormsService > fills > listFormFills filters by form_id and orders by created_at desc
FlowFormsService > fills > getFormFill returns row matched by form + fill ids
FlowFormsService > fills > createFillFromBody requires formId in the body
FlowFormsService > fills > createFillFromBody routes to createFill when formId is present
FlowFormsService > fills > get, update, and delete fill methods route through shared helpers
FlowFormsService > answers > upsertAnswer asserts fill + question, then upserts via TX
FlowFormsService > answers > upsertAnswer rejects when fill does not exist
FlowFormsService > answers > upsertAnswer maps itemId → questionId via normalizeAnswerInput
FlowFormsService > answers > bulkUpsertAnswers iterates and upserts each, asserting question existence per row
FlowFormsService > answers > bulkUpsertAnswers accepts a bare array as input
FlowFormsService > answers > updateAnswer asserts question when questionId is set
FlowFormsService > answers > updateAnswer with no questionId skips the assertExists
FlowFormsService > answers > listFormFillAnswers verifies fill belongs to form, then lists answers
FlowFormsService > answers > deleteAnswer soft deletes after existence check
FlowFormsService > waivers > listWaivers filters by allowed keys
FlowFormsService > waivers > createWaiver inserts a row
FlowFormsService > waivers > createFillWaiver hydrates context from the parent fill
FlowFormsService > waivers > createFillWaiver rejects when the parent fill lacks required fields
FlowFormsService > waivers > update and delete waiver methods route through shared helpers
FlowFormsService > waivers > lists fill waivers and form-fill waivers from hydrated fill context
FlowFormsService > waivers > creates form-fill waivers after verifying fill ownership
FlowFormsService > tenant requirement > requireTenantId throws when no tenant is in request context
FlowFormsService > input validation > createQuestion rejects an array as input body
FlowFormsService > input validation > upsertAnswer rejects when the body is not an object
@stynx/flow module barrel > top-level index.ts is importable
FlowRuntimeService.ensureRun > resolves scope code from scopeId when scopeCode is absent
FlowRuntimeService.ensureRun > uses scopeCode directly when provided
FlowRuntimeService.ensureRun > throws when flow.run_ensure returns no run_id
FlowRuntimeService.ensureRun > requires scopeId when scopeCode is absent
FlowRuntimeService.ensureRun > calls adapter.buildFacts when adapterKey + tenantId are present
FlowRuntimeService.ensureRun > records adapter failure when buildFacts throws + runId is known
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > listRuns assembles filtered query + total count + meta
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > listRuns omits WHERE when no filters
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > list methods use default empty queries when omitted
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > listNodeRuns filters by runId + status
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > listTasks honors mine=true (assignee = current actor)
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > listTasks filters by runId + assigneeUserId + status
FlowRuntimeService listRuns / listNodeRuns / listTasks / listEvents > listEvents filters by runId + nodeId + taskId + kind + actorId
FlowRuntimeService getRun / updateRun / getNodeRun / getTask > getRun returns one or throws NotFound
FlowRuntimeService getRun / updateRun / getNodeRun / getTask > updateRun returns the camelized updated row
FlowRuntimeService getRun / updateRun / getNodeRun / getTask > updateRun throws NotFoundException when row is absent
FlowRuntimeService getRun / updateRun / getNodeRun / getTask > getNodeRun returns one or throws NotFound
FlowRuntimeService getRun / updateRun / getNodeRun / getTask > getTask returns one or throws NotFound
FlowRuntimeService getRun / updateRun / getNodeRun / getTask > listRunNodeRuns / listRunTasks / listRunEvents share the same list shape
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > actTask asserts allowed action + execution allowed, then calls task_complete
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > actTask rejects when assertAllowedAction returns allowed=false
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > actTask throws NotFound when no task row exists
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > actTask throws Forbidden when actorId is missing
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > actTask throws Forbidden when assignee belongs to another actor
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > actTask throws Forbidden when no assignee and actor is not a candidate
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > assignTask asserts management allowed and calls task_assign
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > assignTask throws Forbidden when canManage denies
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > assignTask throws NotFound when task access has no row
FlowRuntimeService task action flows > unassignTask + acceptTask + declineTask + unacceptTask + withdrawTask route to their sql functions
FlowRuntimeService.taskCandidates > passes through non-resolver candidates unchanged
FlowRuntimeService.taskCandidates > expands resolver candidates via adapters.resolveAgents
FlowRuntimeService.taskCandidates > marks resolver as unresolved when no agents returned
FlowRuntimeService.taskCandidates > leaves resolver candidates unresolved when request context or resolver metadata is incomplete
FlowRuntimeService.signal > resolves scopeId from scopeCode when needed and calls signal_changed
FlowRuntimeService.signal > uses scopeId directly when provided
FlowRuntimeService.dispatchPendingEffects > skips events with no effectKey and marks them failed
FlowRuntimeService.dispatchPendingEffects > calls adapter.applyEffect and records success
FlowRuntimeService.dispatchPendingEffects > uses dispatch defaults and tolerates non-object effect payload wrappers
FlowRuntimeService.dispatchPendingEffects > records failure when adapter.applyEffect throws
FlowRuntimeService.dispatchPendingEffects > returns zero counts when no pending events
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > listUsersForRole adds an ilike search clause when search is provided
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > listUsersForRole omits the ilike clause when search is undefined
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > getTaskUser returns one or throws NotFound
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > getRunFacts merges flow.build_facts result with adapter facts
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > signal rejects when neither scopeCode nor scopeId is provided
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > scope resolver helpers require either scope id or scope code
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > records adapter fact failures when a run id is available
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > throws when a task function cannot reload the task
FlowRuntimeService — small helpers + edges > exposes object input validation and tenant requirement edges
Flow backend gap contracts > dispatches pending effects through the adapter and skips already terminal events on retry
Flow backend gap contracts > records failed adapter effect delivery as an effect_failed event
Flow backend gap contracts > expands resolver_fn candidates through the registered adapter
Flow backend gap contracts > rejects task actions from actors that are neither assignees nor concrete candidates
Flow backend gap contracts > returns paged analytics envelopes with stable metadata
Flow backend gap contracts > evaluates policies deterministically with highest priority and deny-on-tie ordering
Flow route contracts > keeps every Flow route private and permissioned
Flow route contracts > marks read routes as read-only
Flow route contracts > audits mutations and idempotently protects retryable task/form writes
Flow route contracts > rate-limits user-triggered runtime mutations
Flow source contracts > pins design table and column mappings used by generic CRUD helpers
Flow source contracts > pins design helper behavior and graph import/export SQL contracts
Flow source contracts > pins forms table mappings and form/fill SQL contracts
Flow source contracts > pins runtime SQL, transaction options, and task function contracts
Flow source contracts > pins validation schema defaults, enums, omit guards, and error payloads
Flow source contracts > pins adapter registry and row utility error contracts
Flow validation and regression guards > rejects invalid workflow DTOs before they reach the database
Flow validation and regression guards > rejects invalid graph imports with duplicate or missing node references
Flow validation and regression guards > wraps domain adapter failures without leaking domain implementation details
Flow validation and regression guards > keeps generic Flow source free of PORM/CMS domain coupling
